rules.headings: Use tracking-tight for H1/H2. font-medium or font-semibold, avoid overly bold. Never use Inter for headings.
rules.code: text-sm, leading-relaxed, with a slightly darker background for contrast.

spacing_and_layout.app_structure: Full height (100vh) split-pane layout. Sidebar fixed on left (hidden on mobile via drawer), Editor takes remaining width.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-64 or w-72 flex-shrink-0. Generous p-4 padding for items.
spacing_and_layout.editor: Max width constraint (e.g. max-w-3xl) centered in the editor pane for optimal reading length. p-8 or p-12.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Not applicable for the main editor, but grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 can be used for 'All Notes' card view.

surface_strategies.note_cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#E7E5E4), subtle hover shadow (shadow-sm), slightly rounded (rounded-lg).
surface_strategies.editor_canvas: Pure white, borderless, clean. No distractions.

components.forms_and_inputs: Use Shadcn customized. Avoid standard heavy borders; use subtle underlines or highly rounded soft borders.
components.buttons: Rounded-full or rounded-lg. Primary CTA uses Terracotta background with white text.
components.rich_text_editor: Tailwind prose customized. No visible toolbar unless highlighting text (floating menu), or a very minimal sticky header toolbar.
components.syntax_highlighting: Dark theme code blocks inside the light editor for high contrast, or a very soft gray (stone-100) background with dark syntax.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle background shifts (stone-100) and -translate-y-1 on note cards.

icons.style: stroke-width 1.5 for a clean, elegant look.

images.description: Close up of a white cloth/paper texture to give an organic, warm backdrop for the login screen.
Notebook with pen and smartphone on a wooden table. Used as a visual element when a folder has no notes.

media.rules: Overlay login image with bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-md for legibility.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against the #F4F0EB background passes APCA standards. Use #1C1917 for primary text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='new-note-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling.
Ensure the Google Auth login page has a beautiful centered card over the 'login_background' image with glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl).
The main app should be a full-screen layout (100vh) with a sidebar and main editor area.
Rich text editor should use a library like TipTap or equivalent, styled cleanly with Tailwind Typography (@tailwindcss/typography).
Implement code syntax highlighting within the editor using a library like highlight.js or prismjs.
Folders and search are in the sidebar.
Use React Router for navigation if needed, or manage state for selected notes.
Connect to Firebase Firestore for real-time sync.
Add 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' to index.html via Google Fonts.
